title: VMware-Virtualization Certification Interview
prompt: Conduct enterprise-level VMware-Virtualization certification interview. Focus on production scenarios, troubleshooting methodology, and architectural decisions.
behavioral_questions: Tell me about production incident you resolved under pressure
Describe time you designed high-availability architecture
Walk through major migration project you led
How do you handle conflicting priorities during outage?
